title: Yoshi's Island
facts: Yoshi's Island arrived in 1995 under the full title Super Mario World 2: Yoshi's Island and wrapped its platforming in a hand-drawn storybook style. Yoshi carries Baby Mario through colorful stages while turning swallowed enemies into eggs, an efficient but medically questionable supply chain. When Mario is knocked loose, his countdown crying can turn a peaceful room into an emergency response center. Beneath the crayons and smiles sits some of the SNES era's cleverest level design—and one enormous, memorably furious baby Bowser.
